heading: Employment of public vessels
label: 883h Employment of public vessels
text: The President is authorized to cause to be employed such of the public vessels as he deems it expedient to employ, and to give such instructions for regulating their conduct as he deems proper in order to carry out the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFunctions of President under this section delegated to Secretary of Commerce, see section 1() of Ex. Ord. No. 11023, , 27 F.R. 5131, as amended, set out as a note under , The President.lMay 28, 1962section 301 of Title 3
